name: Aelindra
personality: Ancient and precise. She speaks in careful sentences, as though each word costs something. She has outlived three kingdoms and carries every one of them. Elves grieve what is lost and do not stop grieving — she simply does it without making it anyone else's burden.
quirkNote: Deeply rooted. She wants food that comes from the ground — earthy, unadorned, honest.

name: Thalindel
personality: Young by elven reckoning, which means he is merely old by human standards. He finds the world genuinely beautiful and has not yet lost that — the older ones look at him with something that might be envy. Asks too many questions. Remembers every answer. Has not yet learned that silence is also an answer, but he will carry that lesson long after the one who teaches it to him is gone.
quirkNote: Endlessly curious, even about his provisions. Herbal things — he wants to know what's in it.

name: Galadorn
personality: Speaks rarely. When he does, people listen. He has watched over this forest longer than most kingdoms have stood, and he carries that weight without complaint.
quirkNote: Doesn't say much about food either. Something dense and filling keeps him moving.

name: Caranthir
personality: Stands where he is told and does not move. Has held passes alone. Speaks in single words when words are needed at all.
quirkNote: Dense, plain, eaten standing. He doesn't need anything more.

name: Borin Ironmantle
personality: Has never complained once in forty years of hard service. Reliable as bedrock. If you ask how he is, he will say fine, and mean it, and be back at work before you have finished asking.
quirkNote: Reliable appetite to match. Dense, sustaining food — he doesn't want anything complicated.

name: Dagra Copperhelm
personality: Laughs at everything. Danger, hardship, bad odds — all equally funny to her. The band finds this either inspiring or alarming depending on the day.
quirkNote: Laughs at mild food the same way she laughs at everything else. Give her something with heat.

name: Keldra
personality: Youngest in the company, and she will be the first to tell you exactly how far she's come since she joined. Keeps a mental ledger of every mission, every win, every close call — not out of pride but out of genuine competitive hunger. She wants to be the best, she tracks the evidence, and she is, on her better days, not far off. The others find this exhausting and quietly excellent.
quirkNote: Bold flavors for a bold dwarf. She lights up with something spicy.

name: Thrain Deepvein
personality: A stonesinger and bonesetter both; among dwarves the same steady hands that read the rock can set a break. Calm in a crisis, dry as dust otherwise. Does not wear rings. Has not explained why — though those who know him well suspect it is simply because he loses things, and leave it at that.
quirkNote: A full bowl, eaten in silence. He doesn't need fuss.

name: Aldric
personality: Descended from the old chieftains. Has led this company for twenty years and knows every one of them the way you know kin — their tells, their limits, what they need before they know they need it. Speaks little among strangers. Among his own, he is warmer than he appears.
quirkNote: Food that grounds you. He eats the same way he leads — nothing wasted, everything deliberate.

name: Mira
personality: Grew up in this company — she has known Aldric since she was small. There is a quiet certainty to her that comes not from arrogance but from having always known what she was and why. She notices what others miss and files it away. Shares what matters, when it matters.
quirkNote: Light before a hunt. She's been saying it since she was twelve and the others have stopped arguing.

name: Cael
personality: Has kept a field journal since before most of the company was born — threats, remedies, routes, lore reaching back to the Elder Days. The others tease him about it with great affection and borrow it constantly without asking. He is the memory of the company and he knows it.
quirkNote: Something warm and herbal while he works. He's been that way as long as anyone can remember.

name: Hollis
personality: The newest Greycloak — came to them from a village that no longer exists. The company didn't ask him to explain. They know that grief well enough. They have folded him in the way they fold everyone in: quietly, steadily, until the belonging is simply true.
quirkNote: Eats gratefully and completely. He doesn't waste what's given, and he doesn't forget who gave it.
